primary_quality_target: make the data, design memory, and workflow gate chain thicker before generating again
what_changed: Run 2.18 expands real commercial-usecase evidence into eight derived multimodal records.
Run 2.18 converts those records into six executable design-memory contracts.
Run 2.18 adds six workflow gates that force evidence, memory, bad-control, trace, and release-boundary binding before the next rerun.
what_did_not_change: No new PPT deck was generated.
Run 2.16 remains the latest generated PPT output.
Run 2.17 remains the latest delivery and motion-boundary proof.
next_rerun_requirements: The full-skill arm must read all three Run 2.18 artifacts before native PPT code generation.
The negative control may read Run 2.18 evidence but must be forbidden from design memory and workflow gate expansion.
Trace manifests must record selected Run 2.18 evidence ids, memory ids, gate ids, bad-control probes, and release boundaries.
The viewer must show Run 2.18 as a Data/Skill layer, not a generated version rail item.
release_boundary: public_blocked until next rerun, layout/native render inspection, motion/video proof, source-boundary review, and human approval pass
